description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script step that runs chmod +x gradlew to make the wrapper executable. Define a build stage with a build job that runs ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle clean assemble and does not allow failure. Define a test stage with a test job that runs ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle check.
